issues.detail: The instructions do not cover all possible error scenarios, such as missing PDF files or permission issues.
The skill file contains verbose explanations and multiple code blocks that could be streamlined.
The instructions rely on specific OS commands (e.g., apt install) and Python environment, limiting cross-platform compatibility.

scenarios.name: Borderless financial table extraction
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly uses camelot with lattice-then-stream fallback, checks accuracy scores, and aggressively cleans currency symbols/commas as specified in the skill; baseline reaches for pdfplumber-only or pandas.read_html without the flavor-fallback pattern.

scenarios.name: Multi-page table concatenation with repeated headers
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses pages='all' with lattice, groups by column count, and removes duplicated header rows at page breaks per the skill; baseline manually loops pages and lacks the duplicated-header dedup step.
